name: Marinated Shrimp on Rosemary Skewers
recipeIngredient: salt and freshly ground black pepper
4 twigs of rosemary with thick woody stems, about 6 to 8-inches in length
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl whisk together the olive oil, lemon juice, lemon zest, garlic, and hot pepper flakes.
2. Pour the marinade over the shrimp in a shallow dish. Cover and refrigerate for 15 to 30 minutes.
3. Preheat a charcoal grill or grill pan on the stovetop.
4. Skewer 3 of the marinated shrimp, alternating with 2 lemon slices, on each rosemary twig. Grill the shrimp for 2 to 3 minutes per side until just cooked through.
5. In a bowl combine the cherry tomatoes, garlic, black olives, parsley, lemon juice, olive oil, salt, and pepper.
6. Serve the grilled shrimp on a bed of the salsa.
Yield: 2 servings
